series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Motor Fuel Audits and Retail Inspections
series_metadata.series_description: Documents may include printouts, reports and audit work papers and related documentation regarding Motor Fuel audits and retail inspections.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy 4 yrs after end of calendar year in which completed, then destroy. ; Electronic: Destroy 4 yrs after end of calednar year in which completed, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
